hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
attraction_cost=0
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='attraction': attraction_cost+=activity_cost(activity)
result=attraction_cost<=0
result_list.append(result)
inner_city_transportation_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    inner_city_transportation_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(inner_city_transportation_cost<=40)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are 2 people, departing from Wuhan to Chengdu for a 2-day trip. Please satisfy any one of the following: 1. Only visit free attractions 2. Budget for local transportation is 40.
